revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguЕҸk 29 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:6жңҲ29ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 6мӣ” 29мқј]][[zh-min-nan:6 goeМҚh 29 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ]][[zh:е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguЕҸk 29 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:6жңҲ29ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 6мӣ” 29мқј]][[zh-min-nan:6 goeМҚh 29 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ]][[zh:е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguЕҸk 29 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:6жңҲ29ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 6мӣ” 29мқј]][[zh-min-nan:6 goeМҚh 29 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ]][[zh:е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguЕҸk 29 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:6жңҲ29ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 6мӣ” 29мқј]][[zh-min-nan:6 goeМҚh 29 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ]][[zh:е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 29|qq=June 29}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=е…ӯжңҲе»ҝд№қ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=мқҢл Ҙ 6мӣ” 29мқј|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 29''' is the 29th day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6жңҲ (ж—§жҡҰ)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|е°Ҹ|qq=}}, then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise, if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|еӨ§|qq=}}, then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|RokuyЕҚ|ja|е…ӯжӣң|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyЕҚ|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|д»Ҹж»…|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}}) вҖ“ The Meiji government restored the former гҖҗChЕҚhei Gakumonjo|жҳҢе№іеқӮеӯҰе•ҸжүҖгҖ‘ of the Tokugawa shogunate as the ChЕҚhei School. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}}) вҖ“ A memorial shrine to honor the war dead from the Boshin War was constructed on Kudanshima in Tokyo; it was later renamed Yasukuni Shrine.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1785|en|1785|qid=Q7756|lt=1785|1=1785}} {{ill|August 3|en|August 3|qid=Q2786|lt=August 3|1=August 3}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Takami Izumiishi|ja|й·№иҰӢжіүзҹі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takami Izumiishi|1=Takami Senseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6531605}}, a Rangaku scholar (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}}). * {{ill|KeiЕҚ|en|KeiЕҚ|qid=Q776775|lt=KeiЕҚ|1=KeiЕҚ}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Shigechiyo Izumi|en|Shigechiyo Izumi|qid=Q435743|lt=Izumi Shigechiyo|1=Shigechiyo Izumi}}, a man reportedly recognized as one of the world's oldest people (died {{ill|1986|en|1986|qid=Q2430|lt=1986|1=1986}}). * {{ill|KeiЕҚ|en|KeiЕҚ|qid=Q776775|lt=KeiЕҚ|1=KeiЕҚ}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|August 9|en|August 9|qid=Q2782|lt=August 9|1=August 9}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Kuroda Seiki|en|Kuroda Seiki|qid=Q910913|lt=Kuroda Seiki|1=Kuroda Seiki}}, an influential Western-style painter (died {{ill|1924|en|1924|qid=Q2173|lt=1924|1=1924}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|KyЕҚwa|en|KyЕҚwa|qid=Q960763|lt=KyЕҚwa|1=KyЕҚwa}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Hosoi Heishu|en|Hosoi Heishu|qid=Q6564648|lt=Hosoi Heisuke|1=Hosoi Heishu}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|е„’еӯҰиҖ…|zh|е„’з”ҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1728|en|1728|qid=Q6947|lt=1728|1=1728}}). * {{ill|TenpЕҚ|en|TenpЕҚ|qid=Q1369045|lt=TenpЕҚ|1=TenpЕҚ}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Matsuura SeizankyЕ«|ja|жқҫжөҰйқҷеұұ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuura SeizankyЕ«|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to жқҫжөҰжё…|1=Matsura Seizan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6788220}}, a daimyЕҚ and the 9th lord of the Hizen (гҖҗHiradoгҖ‘) domain (born {{ill|1760|en|1760|qid=Q7646|lt=1760|1=1760}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|28|6|30|5|29|7|6|0629|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
